file_scope_lock.authoritative_ci_reason: CI's --manifest-source git resolves this lane's file_scope_lock from the IMMUTABLE initial baseline -- the content of docs/06_status/lanes/UTV2-1557.json as it existed in the first commit that added that file (a538b41e708fbaca2d7b3d44fa1dd343d74de3d4). That baseline never included .lane/lanes/governance.yml. Later commits in this PR edited file_scope_lock to include it, but CI does not trust anything a PR's own diff writes into its own manifest (UTV2-1521 anti-self-widening design) -- so that edit has no effect on the authoritative verdict.
